title: Read database_schema.sql and copilot-instructions.md, then write docs/agentic-docs/database-schema.md documenting every table, column, type, index, RLS policy, trigger, and function. Include TOC. Reference migration numbering (highest: 039, note any gaps). Do not modify source files.
description: Read infra/supabase/migrations/database_schema.sql (503 lines) and .github/copilot-instructions.md (332 lines). Write docs/agentic-docs/database-schema.md with: TOC, every table with columns/types, all RLS policies, all triggers, all functions, index listing, migration inventory (001-039). Note: objective says 001-040 but highest migration is 039. Acceptance: every table and RLS policy from database_schema.sql is documented.

title: Read source entry points and package.json files across the monorepo, then write docs/agentic-docs/architecture-overview.md with system architecture, component boundaries, data flow Mermaid diagram, and deployment topology. Include TOC.
description: Read: turbo.json, pnpm-workspace.yaml, all package.json files, apps/mobile/src/navigation/, apps/web-portal/app/layout.tsx, packages/database/src/, infra/supabase/ structure. Write docs/agentic-docs/architecture-overview.md covering: monorepo structure, app boundaries, Supabase backend layer, shared packages, data flow (user -> mobile/web -> Supabase -> PostGIS), at least one valid Mermaid diagram, deployment topology notes. Acceptance: file exists with accurate Mermaid diagram representing system topology.

title: Primary review pass - scope identification and risk assessment
Deep analysis: Database schema & RLS policy reconciliation
description: Read all migration files, reconstruct complete RLS policy map, identify tables with missing policies, map triggers/functions

title: Step 3: Web Portal & Mobile App Feature Audit
description: Analyze all web-portal components/routes/services and mobile screens/stores/navigation. Identify type gaps, dead code, error handling issues, and map implemented vs documented features.

title: Step 4: Documentation Staleness Audit
description: Read all files in docs/, docs/workflows/, docs/todos/. Cross-reference claims against actual codebase. Flag outdated/inaccurate/superseded content. Key suspects: supabase-integration-status.md, INTEGRATION_COMPLETE_SUMMARY.md, workflow MOB-01 through MOB-10, todos/*.md.

title: Update REFACTORING_SUMMARY.md: fix all line counts, add ViewModeToggle and DishMarkers entries, verify component purpose descriptions against actual code, update Before/After stats (BasicMapScreen is now 807 lines not 243), update Next Steps section
description: Read each file in apps/mobile/src/components/map/ and apps/mobile/src/screens/BasicMapScreen.tsx. Update apps/mobile/docs/REFACTORING_SUMMARY.md with: (1) correct line counts for all files, (2) new component entries for ViewModeToggle.tsx (44 lines, view mode toggle) and DishMarkers.tsx (80 lines, dish markers on map), (3) accurate component descriptions matching actual code, (4) updated Before/After statistics. Acceptance: every line count in the doc matches wc -l of the source file, no components are missing, no false claims about component purposes.
